final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [23:0] data_in,
    input [9:0] write_addr,
    input [9:0] read_addr,
    input write_en,
    output reg [23:0] data_out
);reg [23:0] mem [0:1023];

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (write_en) begin mem[write_addr] <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= mem[read_addr] ;
  end

endmodule
